heading: Applicability of subchapter
label: 7802 Applicability of subchapter
text: Parts B, C, D, E, and F of this subchapter do not apply to subchapter VII of this chapter.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 7802, , as added , , , set out purpose of provisions relating to Indian education, prior to the general amendment of former subchapter IX of this chapter by .Pub. L. 89–10, title IX, § 9102Pub. L. 103–382, title I, § 101108 Stat. 3774Pub. L. 107–110Oct. 20, 1994

Amendments2015—, substituted “Parts B, C, D, E, and F of this subchapter do not apply to subchapter VII” for “Parts B, C, D, and E of this subchapter do not apply to subchapter VIII”.Pub. L. 114–95, § 8003

Effective Date of 2015 AmendmentAmendment by effective , except with respect to certain noncompetitive programs and competitive programs, see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 114–95section 5 of Pub. L. 114–95section 6301 of this titleDec. 10, 2015
